meaning: adv.向风,迎风,上风adj.上风的n.上风面
examples: Lower the windward anchor to seafloor.
Aerator should be generally placed in the center of fishpond or like windward on the drawing.
Each rise correlates with the windward-facing slope of the terrain, while declines in cloudiness are found in valleys on the leeward side.
Rainbows are also likely here, as this is the wet, windward side of the island.
Drive up the Windward Coast to the North Shore for surfing, stand-up paddle boarding and windy walks out to Kaena Point.
